content:
I am pleased to announce that WIPO’s Coordination Committee today approved the eight-member senior management team that will join me on Oct. 1, 2026, when I begin my second term of office.

Looking forward, we must scale, accelerate, deepen and broaden our impact, while responding to a global landscape characterized by growing complexity and uncertainty.

This team possesses the right experience, expertise, competencies and qualities, both as individuals and together, to support me in fulfilling our mandate. I look forward to their contributions.

I thank the Coordination Committee members for approving the incoming Sector Leads:

Deputy Directors General:
• Pascal Faure (France) – Copyright, Creative Economy and IP Governance Sector
• Laura Peter (USA) – Patents and Technology Sector
• Mzukisi Qobo (South Africa) – Regional and National Development Sector
• Shen Changyu (China) – Brands and Designs Sector

Assistant Directors General:
• Marco M. Alemán (Colombia) – IP and Innovation Ecosystems Sector
• Chitra Narayanaswamy (Switzerland) – Corporate Management and Transformation Sector
• Ken-Ichiro Natsume (Japan) – Infrastructure and Platforms Sector
• Andrew Staines (UK) – Global Challenges, Opportunities and Partnerships Sector

To the outgoing Sector Leads who accompanied me over the last six years: You have my deepest gratitude and appreciation, and I’d like to recognize each of you for your dedication, professionalism, camaraderie and counsel as we transformed WIPO together.
🙏 Sylvie Forbin (France) – Copyright and Creative Industries Sector
🙏 Lisa Jorgenson (USA) – Patents and Technology Sector
🙏 Hasan Kleib (Indonesia) – Regional and National Development Sector
🙏 Edward Kwakwa (Ghana) – Global Challenges and Partnerships Sector
🙏 Wang Binying (China) – Brands and Designs Sector

#WIPO #wipoGA
